statement: In every magma, Equation 1511 (`x = (y * x) * (z * (w * y))`) implies Equation 433 (`x = x * (y * (x * (z * y)))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0475
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y x) (op z (op w y)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op x (op y (op x (op z y))))
